test_add_to_cart_duplicate_item.failure_message: AssertionError: expected quantity 2, got 1. Adding the same item twice should increment quantity.

test_cart_item_quantity.failure_message: AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'quantity'. Cart item was None after add_to_cart() returned success. Possible race condition.

test_update_cart_quantity_zero.failure_message: AssertionError: expected item removal, cart still contains item with quantity 0. Zero-quantity items will appear in checkout.

test_cart_persistence_across_sessions.failure_message: AssertionError: cart empty after session restore. This is a regression of BUG-001: checkout fails when cart state is not persisted.
